title: Phragmipedium longifolium
taxonomy: Phragmipedium longifolium is a species of orchid in the genus Phragmipedium. The genus Phragmipedium is part of the subfamily Vanilloideae, which is a group of orchids that are often referred to as the "vanillas". Phragmipedium longifolium is also classified as belonging to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. The subfamily Vanilloideae is further divided into several genera, with Phragmipedium being one of the most well-known. This classification is based on the plant's physical characteristics and genetic relationships with other plants in the same family.
